title: selinum pyrenaeum var. benthamineum
intro: Selinum pyrenaeum var. benthamineum, also known as a variety of the Pyrenean wild celery, is a plant species in the carrot family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Selinum pyrenaeum var. benthamineum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
